    • Getting Started

rxsim

The goal of rxsim is to reduce friction in simulating randomized clinical trials (RCT).

Installation

You can install the development version of rxsim from GitHub with:

install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("Boehringer-Ingelheim/rxsim")

Usage

Checkout the vignette that shows a basic example:

vignette("example-usecase", package="rxsim")
